channel.title: Characters of The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste on Luki Belle – Fiction Author
channel.description: Recent content in Characters of The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste on Luki Belle – Fiction Author

item.title: Bhaali – Loyalty, Memory, and Silent Witness | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What does it mean to know the truth—and choose not to speak it? Bhaali exists at the center of memory, loyalty, and silence—carrying the weight of a past few others fully understand.

Role in the Story

Bhaali is the aged caretaker of the Yervaan palace.

He oversees:

  • the household
  • the staff
  • the quiet functioning of daily life

He is more than a servant.

He is:

  • a confidant to Kaslini and Jeshn
  • a guardian of order
  • a witness to everything that has unfolded within the palace

He also becomes a bridge—

item.title: Chamcham – Innocence, Intuition, and Hidden Influence | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What does a child see that others overlook? Chamcham moves through a world of power, secrecy, and tension with something rare—clarity untouched by fear, politics, or prejudice.

Role in the Story

Chamcham is a young boy living within the Yervaan palace.

He serves:

  • as attendant to Gulaan Dasmire
  • as companion and confidant to Jeshn
  • as a quiet observer of the household

His presence appears small.

But his role is not.

item.title: Gulaan Dasmire – Identity, Disguise, and Moral Conflict | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What happens when a man is forced to become someone else—and begins to believe in that version? Gulaan Dasmire is not merely a disguise. He is a constructed identity that reshapes perception, emotion, and truth.

Role in the Story

Gulaan Dasmire is the assumed identity of Valstohl Baquiste—a disgraced Llehstanzite naturalist sent into Southern Hastan under the pretense of research.

His mission is clear:

  • gather intelligence on the thugs
  • assimilate with the Yervaans
  • observe without suspicion

He is expected to be invisible in power—

item.title: Influential Figures and Hidden Forces | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
Not all who shape a story stand at its center. Some influence quietly. Some disrupt unexpectedly. Some exist only for a moment—yet leave a lasting impact.

Forces That Shape the Story

Ambassador General Masim Tropart

The architect behind the mission.

A figure of authority whose decisions extend far beyond the battlefield—shaping outcomes through distance, strategy, and control.

The Veiled Woman

A presence without explanation.

Her encounters with Gulaan are brief, enigmatic, and deeply unsettling—awakening something beyond reason.

item.title: Jeshn Yervaan – Resistance, Tradition, and Identity | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What does it mean to inherit a world that has already been taken from you? Jeshn Yervaan does not seek transformation—he carries the weight of preservation, resistance, and identity in a world shaped by colonial power.

Role in the Story

Jeshn Yervaan is the heir to one of the most powerful Hastan families in the Daikalin region.

A landowner. A protector. A son bound by legacy.

He stands at the intersection of:

item.title: Kaslini Yervaan – Power, Survival, and Diplomacy | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What does power look like when survival depends on submission, strategy, and control? Kaslini Yervaan does not resist openly—she endures, adapts, and protects.

Role in the Story

Kaslini Yervaan is the matriarch of the Yervaan household and the force sustaining its legacy.

A landowner. A mother. A strategist.

After the death of her husband, she assumes responsibility for:

  • the Daikalin farming operations
  • the protection of her son
  • the stability of the region’s elite families

Her role is not simply leadership.

item.title: Lieutenant Colonel Brune Farmagash – Loyalty, Honor, and Protection | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What defines a soldier—duty, or the instinct to protect those who cannot protect themselves? Lieutenant Colonel Brune Farmagash stands at the intersection of loyalty, experience, and quiet compassion.

Role in the Story

Brune Farmagash is a senior officer of the Monarchy and a long-time subordinate of Valstohl Baquiste.

But their relationship extends beyond rank.

He is:

  • advisor
  • protector
  • stabilizing presence

Having fought alongside Valstohl, Brune understands both:

  • his brilliance
  • his volatility

He plays a crucial role in:

item.title: Remalini Yervaan – Madness, Memory, and Tragedy | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What remains when memory fractures but emotion endures? Remalini Yervaan exists between past and present—where loss is constant, and reality is no longer fixed.

Role in the Story

Remalini Yervaan is the first wife of Sir Bojeshnomaan Yervaan.

Once admired for her beauty—

she now lives confined within the Yervaan palace.

Separated from the world.

Watched.

Contained.

Her presence is disruptive, unsettling, and impossible to ignore.

She is spoken about in fragments—

item.title: Sergeant Solkian Frashtakh – Brutality, Survival, and Control | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
What happens when survival replaces honor? Sergeant Solkian Frashtakh is not driven by ideology—he is driven by necessity, fear, and the relentless pressure to maintain control.

Role in the Story

Sergeant Solkian Frashtakh is the commanding officer of the Llehstanzite regiment stationed in the Daikalin region.

His responsibilities are clear:

  • enforce colonial rule
  • extract agricultural profits
  • suppress rebellion
  • maintain order at all costs

But the environment he operates in is unstable.

item.title: Valstohl Baquiste – Character Analysis | The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
Who is Valstohl Baquiste beneath rank, duty, and disguise? In The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste, his journey is not merely a mission—it is a confrontation with identity, memory, and truth.

Role in the Story

Valstohl Baquiste is a colonel entrusted with a mission that demands precision, intelligence, and deception. Under the guise of Gulaan Dasmire, he enters Southern Hastan—stepping into a world that quietly challenges everything he believes about power, culture, and control.
